drug_name: Degasa Hand Sanitizer Lemon Lime Scent
active_ingredients: Active Ingredients Ethyl alcohol 70% Purpose Antiseptic
indications_and_usage: Uses To decrease bacteria on the skin that could disease. Recommended for repeated use.
dosage_and_administration: Directions - Wet hands thoroughly with product and allow to dry without wiping. - For children under 6, use only under adults supervision. - Not recommended for infants.
